name: stock-analysis
tagline: ClawHub (254★): Analyze stocks and cryptocurrencies using Yahoo Finance data. Supports portfolio management, watchlists with alerts, divide
verdict: Main risk: adding a stock to your portfolio or watchlist twice creates a duplicate entry, with no check for what's already there. It also pulls live data from five outside services (Yahoo Finance, CoinGecko, Twitter, SEC EDGAR) with zero fallback if any go down. Security and file hygiene are solid.

highlights.summary: Multiple external-dependency flows (Yahoo Finance, CoinGecko, Google News, Twitter auth, SEC EDGAR) have no stated behavior for missing tools, failed fetches, or absent auth anywhe
Portfolio add and watchlist add are accumulating operations with no mention of checking for an existing identical entry before appending, so a second run would duplicate holdings/w
No 'NOT for' / exclusion / out-of-scope language appears anywhere in the description or body.
